product_name: Milk Thistle & Vitamin B12 Face Serum
about_the_product: A powerful antioxidant serum designed to visibly improve skin clarity, repair the skin barrier, and gently fight early signs of stress related aging. This serum helps restore balance to tired, sensitive, or pollution affected skin, while deeply hydrating and supporting long term skin strength.

Infused with a thoughtful blend of science backed ingredients: Milk Thistle (Silymarin), Vitamin B12, Niacinamide, and Sodium Hyaluronate, this formula works to calm oxidative inflammation, a hidden stress response caused by pollution and UV exposure. It supports blood flow in the skin, strengthens the skin barrier, and soothes skin without clogging pores or causing irritation.
Whether you are dealing with dullness, pigmentation, or post acne sensitivity, this lightweight serum delivers calming repair and a healthy, glowing look.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Your skin is not just a surface, it is your first line of defense. Daily exposure to UV rays, pollution, and blue light triggers a deeper biological response known as oxidative inflammation: a harmful cycle of oxidative stress and ongoing inflammation that slowly breaks down your skin barrier. The result is redness, dullness, dehydration, and early signs of aging. The Milk Thistle & Vitamin B12 Face Serum is formulated to break that cycle at the root. Silymarin (Milk Thistle) and Vitamin B12, both backed by clinical research, work together to neutralize free radicals, reduce inflammation, and calm stressed skin. Niacinamide, Centella Asiatica, and Panthenol help rebuild the skin's lipid barrier, support repair, and soothe visible irritation, while Sodium Hyaluronate and Glycerin deliver deep, lasting hydration. The result is skin that's brighter, calmer, and stronger, especially against urban stress factors. It is not just another serum, it is skincare that works at a cellular level, because for us, healthy skin is not just about glow, it is about restoring balance, strengthening your defenses, and protecting what matters beneath the surface.

key_ingredients.name: Milk Thistle (Silybum Marianum)
key_ingredients.benefits: A clinically backed antioxidant known for calming inflammation, reducing dark spots, and protecting skin against environmental stress.

key_ingredients.name: Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin)
key_ingredients.benefits: Helves reduce oxidative stress and inflammation while boosting the skin's ability to renew itself, particularly effective for redness, dullness, and post acne recovery.

key_ingredients.name: Niacinamide (Vitamin B3)
key_ingredients.benefits: Minimizes enlarged pores, evens out skin tone, and supports collagen production.

key_ingredients.name: Centella Asiatica
key_ingredients.benefits: A time tested skin soothing ingredient that calms irritation, promotes healing, and improves hydration.

key_ingredients.name: Sodium Hyaluronate
key_ingredients.benefits: Delivers deep hydration, plumps the skin, and maintains moisture balance without feeling heavy.

key_ingredients.name: Panthenol (Provitamin B5)
key_ingredients.benefits: Hydrates, softens, and supports skin barrier repair.

key_ingredients.name: Geogard ECT (Natural Preservative)
key_ingredients.benefits: Ensures product stability and safety without harsh chemicals.

what_sets_us_apart: Clinically backed antioxidant defense: fights pollution caused oxidative inflammation, neutralizes free radicals, and supports long term skin strength.
Barrier repairing hydration: lightweight yet effective hydration that strengthens the skin's natural defenses without clogging pores.
Precise formulation: each ingredient is purposefully chosen for proven effectiveness, no fluff, no fillers.
Science meets skin health: a clean formulation approach built on dermatological insight and advanced delivery methods.
full_ingredient_list: Benzyl Alcohol (and) Salicylic Acid (and) Glycerin (and) Sorbic Acid
recommended_for: Dull, tired, or pollution stressed skin
Early signs of aging and loss of firmness
All skin types, including sensitive skin
People exposed to urban pollution and blue light stress
how_to_use: Apply 2 to 3 pumps to clean, damp skin after toner.
Gently massage and press into the face and neck until fully absorbed.
Follow with your moisturizer and sunscreen (AM) or facial oil (PM).
Use daily, morning and night, for best results.

sensory_experience.feels_like: Lightweight, milky serum, non sticky, quick absorbing.
sensory_experience.smells_like: Fragrance free formula with a mild botanical freshness.

pro_tip: Keep the serum in the refrigerator for a refreshing boost, great for calming redness, soothing stress, and improving absorption.

product_name: Deep Cleanse Centella Moroccan Red Clay Mask

product_details.target_skin_types: All Skin Types (especially oily, acne prone, and congested skin)

about_the_product: A detoxifying, skin balancing clay mask formulated to deeply cleanse, gently exfoliate, and soothe inflammation, without over drying. This mask brings together the oil absorbing power of mineral clays with calming botanicals and gentle active ingredients to unclog pores, decongest skin, and promote a smooth, even texture.

Powered by Centella Asiatica, Willow Bark, and Papaya Enzymes, it helps reduce excess oil, calm acne flare ups, and refine skin tone. Ideal for urban skin exposed to daily pollution and product buildup, this mask delivers a refreshing reset for skin that feels overwhelmed, dull, or reactive.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Your skin faces more than just surface dirt: urban pollution, sweat, sunscreen residue, and hormonal imbalances can silently clog pores, trigger inflammation, and throw your skin off balance. Healthy skin starts with a clear foundation. Our Deep Cleanse Centella & Moroccan Red Clay Mask is powered by a precise blend of mineral clays and soothing bioactive ingredients to reset congested, stressed out skin. Moroccan Red Clay and Kaolin work together to gently lift out impurities, excess oil, and micro pollutants without disrupting the skin's natural barrier. Willow Bark (a natural BHA) and Papaya enzymes promote gentle exfoliation, encouraging cell turnover and refined texture. Centella Asiatica, Tea Tree Oil, and Allantoin soothe irritation and calm inflammation, while Niacinamide and Zinc Oxide help reduce excess oil and support barrier recovery. Because for us, deep cleansing is not just about removing, it is about repairing, balancing, and bringing your skin back to clarity.

key_ingredients.name: Moroccan Red Clay & Kaolin
key_ingredients.benefits: Rich in minerals and gentle on skin, these clays draw out dirt, oil, and pollutants without disrupting the skin barrier.

key_ingredients.name: Centella Asiatica Extract
key_ingredients.benefits: Calms irritation, speeds up skin healing, and improves resilience.

key_ingredients.name: Willow Bark Extract
key_ingredients.benefits: A natural source of salicylic acid that helps unclog pores and gently exfoliate.

key_ingredients.name: Papaya Fruit Extract
key_ingredients.benefits: Breaks down dead skin cells naturally, brightening the complexion.

key_ingredients.name: Niacinamide
key_ingredients.benefits: Refines skin texture, reduces oiliness, and strengthens the skin barrier.

key_ingredients.name: Tea Tree Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: Provides antibacterial and anti inflammatory benefits, ideal for blemish prone skin.

key_ingredients.name: Lactic Acid
key_ingredients.benefits: Gently exfoliates and hydrates, improving skin texture and clarity.

key_ingredients.name: Allantoin & Glycerin
key_ingredients.benefits: Hydrate, soften, and soothe the skin after detoxing.

what_sets_us_apart: Clay detox without the dryness: deep cleansing yet skin soothing.
Multi action formula: combines exfoliation, oil control, and calming in one step.
Sensitive skin friendly: balances active ingredients with barrier supporting ones.
Evidence led formulation: designed with clinically studied botanicals and safe acids.
full_ingredient_list: Benzyl Alcohol (and) Salicylic Acid (and) Glycerin (and) Sorbic Acid
recommended_for: Pollution affected and product stressed skin
how_to_use: Apply a thin, even layer to clean, dry skin. Avoid the eye and lip areas.
Leave on for 10 to 15 minutes until the mask starts to dry but does not crack.
Rinse off with lukewarm water and pat dry.
Use 1 to 2 times a week for best results.

sensory_experience.feels_like: Smooth, creamy clay that spreads easily and does not over dry.
sensory_experience.smells_like: Clean, slightly earthy with a refreshing herbal hint.

pro_tip: Want to make your clay mask work much harder? Steam your face for 2 to 3 minutes before applying. It opens up your pores so the clays and botanicals can go deeper, draw out impurities, and calm inflammation more effectively. Smarter masking means better glow.

about_the_product: A multi functional toner crafted to refine pores, deeply hydrate, and restore balance after cleansing. This toner refreshes and preps the skin with a blend of floral waters, hydrating moisture binding ingredients, and calming actives. It helps tighten enlarged pores, soothe inflammation, and boost moisture retention without stripping your skin.

Formulated with botanical waters like Neroli, Geranium, and Chamomile, along with Vitamin B12, Hydrolyzed Collagen, and Beta Glucan, this toner supports skin barrier health, smoothens texture, and calms early signs of inflammation. Ideal for daily use, especially for skin exposed to pollution, stress, and blue light.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Your skin faces more than just dirt after a long day: UV rays, pollution, and even hard water silently disrupt its natural balance. This daily exposure triggers oxidative inflammation, a cycle of oxidative stress and inflammation that weakens your barrier, enlarges pores, and leads to dehydration and sensitivity. The Pore Minimizing + Hydration Boost Toner is formulated to interrupt that cycle gently and effectively. Antioxidant rich floral waters like Neroli and Geranium help neutralize oxidative stress, while moisture binding ingredients like Glycerin, Sodium PCA, and Hyaluronic Acid replenish moisture and smooth skin texture. Hydrolyzed Collagen and Vitamin B12 work to strengthen the skin barrier and support microcirculation, while Allantoin, Cucumber, and Chamomile deliver calm to stressed, sensitive skin. The result is a clear, hydrated, and visibly refined complexion that feels balanced and looks refreshed. Because for us, healthy skin is not just about glow, it is about restoring balance, rebuilding strength, and protecting what truly matters beneath the surface.

key_ingredients.benefits: Naturally astringent and antimicrobial, helps tone the skin and reduce the appearance of pores.

key_ingredients.name: Geranium Hydrosol
key_ingredients.benefits: Regulates oil production and soothes sensitive skin.

key_ingredients.name: Cucumber Extract

what_sets_us_apart: Dual action: pore refining and hydration boosting in one step.
Ultra calming formula: designed for sensitive, stressed, and post cleansing skin.
Protection from oxidative inflammation: defends against hidden environmental damage.
Clean, balanced formulation: no harsh alcohols, no fillers, no synthetic fragrance.
full_ingredient_list: Benzyl Alcohol (and) Salicylic Acid (and) Glycerin (and) Sorbic Acid
recommended_for: Urban lifestyles exposed to pollution and blue light
how_to_use: Spray directly onto clean skin or onto a cotton pad and swipe gently across the face. Use daily after cleansing and before serum or moisturizer. Can be used morning and night.

sensory_experience.feels_like: Lightweight, watery mist that instantly refreshes.
sensory_experience.smells_like: Subtle floral herbal aroma with a cooling after feel.

pro_tip: Think of this as a mini facial in a bottle. Soak some toner onto cotton pads, place them on your cheeks, forehead, and chin, and let them sit for 5 minutes. It is a quick hydration reset that calms, tones, and tightens, all while you check your emails or scroll in peace.

about_the_product: An expertly formulated treatment oil that harnesses the power of nature's finest botanicals to deliver a multi functional oil that goes beyond basic conditioning. Scalp Nourishing Hair Oil is carefully crafted to detoxify, soothe, and strengthen the scalp while promoting strong hair growth and shine.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Healthy hair begins at the root, and our Scalp Nourishing Hair Oil is engineered to do more than just condition: it detoxifies, nourishes, and shields your scalp. Infused with potent botanicals and advanced nano technology, it penetrates deep into the hair shaft and scalp, ensuring strong growth, reduced damage from hard water and pollution, and a natural shine. By using nano penetration technology, our formula reduces active ingredients to a very small size for unmatched delivery. In addition to maintaining optimal pH and stimulating blood circulation, our treatment replenishes essential nutrients and strengthens the scalp's protective barrier.

key_ingredients.name: Rosemary Oil (Salvia rosmarinus)
key_ingredients.benefits: Packed with antioxidants like rosmarinic acid, it boosts blood circulation to deliver vital nutrients to hair follicles, promoting strong hair growth and protecting against oxidative stress.

key_ingredients.name: Kalonji Oil (Nigella sativa)
key_ingredients.benefits: Rich in essential fatty acids and potent antioxidants, this oil soothes scalp irritation, reduces inflammation, and strengthens hair follicles to minimize hair fall and encourage fuller hair.

key_ingredients.name: Peppermint Oil (Mentha piperita)
key_ingredients.benefits: Infused with menthol, it provides a refreshing, cooling sensation while stimulating microcirculation, activating hair follicles for healthier growth.

key_ingredients.name: Tea Tree Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: With powerful antimicrobial and antifungal properties, it cleanses the scalp, fights dandruff, and maintains a balanced environment for optimal scalp health.

key_ingredients.name: Neem Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: Known for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial benefits, Neem oil protects the scalp from environmental stress and helps maintain a healthy skin microbiome.

key_ingredients.name: Lemon Essential Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: High in vitamin C and antioxidants, this oil naturally balances scalp pH, controls excess oil, and gently exfoliates dead skin cells, improving overall scalp clarity.

key_ingredients.name: MCT Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: Derived from coconut oil, this lightweight, non greasy carrier improves the penetration of active ingredients, deeply conditioning and nourishing both the scalp and hair while reinforcing the moisture barrier.

what_sets_us_apart: Our formula is engineered to deliver potent active ingredients in nano sized particles for unmatched absorption, ensuring deep nourishment and effective protection against environmental stress.
how_to_use: Pat hair and apply the oil directly to dry scalp and hair. Massage in and leave for 30 minutes to 1 hour, or overnight for best results. Rinse out and follow with Bonji's Advanced Scalp Clarifying Shampoo.

sensory_experience.feels_like: A lightweight, cushioning oil with no greasy residue.
sensory_experience.smells_like: A refreshing mix of natural lemon and rosemary with a hint of mint.

pro_tip: Love slugging for your skin? Now imagine that same deep hydration for your hair. Root Revival+ Scalp Protecting Oil can be used as an overnight slugging treatment to provide intensive moisturizing benefits to your scalp and strands.
the_problem: Hard water: High levels of minerals in hard water (such as calcium and magnesium) deposit on the hair and scalp, reducing shine and increasing dryness.
Fine particulate matter (PM2.5): Urban pollutants adhere to hair and scalp, increasing oxidative stress by generating free radicals.
Prolonged UV exposure: Degrades keratin proteins, reducing hair strength by 15 to 20 percent over time.
The combined effects of hard water, pollution, and UV radiation compromise scalp health and hair strength, hindering natural repair and resulting in thinner, less resilient hair.

about_the_product: A science backed clarifying shampoo designed to deeply cleanse the scalp, remove buildup, and restore pH balance without stripping natural oils. Formulated with activated charcoal, apple cider vinegar, and scalp balancing botanicals to detoxify and refresh while promoting a healthier hair environment.

Whether you are dealing with pollution buildup, hard water residue, or an oily scalp, this gentle yet effective formula resets the scalp and strands, leaving your hair light, clean, and naturally revitalized.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Urban pollution, hard water, and product buildup silently compromise your scalp, clogging follicles, altering pH levels, and weakening the protective barrier. The result is dullness, flakiness, and slowed hair growth over time. Healthy hair does not begin with your strands, it starts at the scalp. Our Advanced Scalp Clarifying Shampoo is powered by a precise blend of gentle plant based cleansers and clinically backed active ingredients that go beyond surface level cleansing. Activated charcoal and apple cider vinegar detox the scalp by lifting pollutants, mineral residue, and excess oils. Glycolic acid provides gentle exfoliation, encouraging cell turnover and a refreshed scalp environment. Hydrolyzed keratin and argan oil repair and smoothen each strand, while panthenol and sodium PCA restore moisture and support a healthy scalp barrier. Because for us, scalp clarity is not just refreshing, it is the science behind stronger, shinier, more resilient hair.

key_ingredients.benefits: Deeply cleanses, removes excess oil and impurities, and prevents buildup without stripping moisture.

key_ingredients.benefits: Balances scalp pH, adds natural shine, and helps remove product residue.

key_ingredients.name: Argan Oil

key_ingredients.name: Hydrolyzed Keratin
key_ingredients.benefits: Helps repair damaged hair cuticles and smoothens texture.

key_ingredients.name: Glycolic Acid & Citric Acid
key_ingredients.benefits: Gently exfoliates dead skin and detoxifies the scalp without harsh abrasives.

key_ingredients.name: Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride
key_ingredients.benefits: Naturally conditions and adds slip for easy detangling.

key_ingredients.name: Geogard ECT
key_ingredients.benefits: A natural, globally accepted preservative for safe, clean formulation.

what_sets_us_apart: Deep detox, zero dryness: charcoal and acids clarify the scalp while botanical oils and moisture binding ingredients keep it balanced.
Pollution and hard water protection: specifically formulated for urban lifestyles and mineral heavy water.
Scalp first formulation: because healthy hair starts with a clean, nourished scalp.
Clean science, no sulfates or silicones: thoughtfully formulated for effectiveness, safety, and balance.
full_ingredient_list: Benzyl Alcohol (and) Salicylic Acid (and) Glycerin (and) Sorbic Acid
recommended_for: Oily scalp, buildup, or dull looking hair
Flaky, itchy scalp needing a reset
Urban exposure to pollution or hard water
All hair types seeking clarity and softness
how_to_use: Apply to wet scalp and hair. Massage gently to lather and detoxify. Leave for 1 to 2 minutes for active ingredients to work. Rinse thoroughly. Follow with a nourishing conditioner or mask. Use 2 to 3 times a week, or as needed, for a fresh scalp reset.

sensory_experience.feels_like: Lightweight cream lather that rinses clean.
sensory_experience.smells_like: A soothing earthy blend with a cooling finish.

pro_tip: For a total scalp reset, steam your scalp for 3 to 5 minutes before using this shampoo. This opens up follicles so the active ingredients can work harder. Follow with a cooling rinse to seal in that fresh, detoxed feeling.

about_the_product: An expertly formulated scalp treatment oil that brings instant relief to dry, itchy, and dandruff prone scalps. Scalp Soothing Hair Oil targets the root causes of scalp irritation, which are microbial imbalance, inflammation, and barrier disruption, while restoring hydration and comfort.

Powered by nano emulsion technology and enriched with botanical actives like Tea Tree, Peppermint, Rosemary, and Neem, the oil works deep within the scalp to rebalance oil production, calm inflammation, and fight dandruff causing microbes.

Its lightweight, fast absorbing texture delivers potent ingredients without weighing your scalp down, leaving it clean, nourished, and refreshed. With consistent use, the formula helps restore the scalp microbiome and protect against environmental triggers like pollution and hard water.
the_science_behind_the_formula: Your scalp is more than just skin, it is a dynamic, living ecosystem. But in daily life, it is constantly under attack: pollution, hard water, UV rays, and stress silently disrupt its balance. These triggers activate oxidative inflammation, a cycle of oxidative stress and inflammation that weakens the scalp barrier and invites itchiness, dandruff, and flaking. Scalp Soothing Hair Oil is designed to break this cycle. Using nano emulsion technology, it delivers potent botanical actives like Tea Tree, Neem, and Peppermint deep into the scalp, targeting inflammation, microbial imbalance, and excess oil production at the source. Rosemary and Kalonji oils improve circulation and provide antioxidant support, while MCT oil restores moisture and reinforces the scalp's barrier without feeling greasy. The result is a calm, clear, and hydrated scalp that feels refreshed, not irritated. Because for us, scalp care is not just about surface relief, it is about restoring balance at the biological level.

key_ingredients.benefits: Natural antifungal and antibacterial that targets dandruff, reduces itch, and calms scalp inflammation.

key_ingredients.name: Peppermint Oil
key_ingredients.benefits: Provides a cooling sensation, relieves discomfort, and boosts circulation to support healthy follicles.

key_ingredients.name: Kalonji (Black Seed) Oil

what_sets_us_apart: Microbiome support at the root: targets dandruff and irritation by addressing microbial imbalance.
Advanced delivery system: nano emulsified for deeper, faster absorption and greater effectiveness.
Multi benefit botanical actives: anti inflammatory, antifungal, and soothing ingredients in one treatment.
Clean, conscious formulation: no silicones, no synthetic fragrances, no unnecessary fillers, just functional ingredients.
recommended_for: Urban exposure to pollution, hard water, and heat styling
All hair types, including color treated and curly hair
how_to_use: Apply 3 to 4 pumps directly onto the scalp.
Massage gently in circular motions for 2 to 3 minutes.
Leave on for at least 30 minutes, or overnight for deeper results.
Follow with Bonji's Advanced Scalp Clarifying Shampoo.
Use 2 to 3 times a week for visible results.

sensory_experience.feels_like: Lightweight, non greasy oil with a soothing finish.
sensory_experience.smells_like: A fresh blend of minty herbal notes from tea tree, rosemary, and peppermint.

pro_tip: Dealing with stubborn flakes or irritation? Warm a few drops of the oil between your palms, apply it to your scalp, and wrap your hair in a warm towel for 20 minutes. It is a mini steam treatment that boosts absorption, soothes inflammation, and helps the formula work harder.
